records.title: How to obtain a claims history letter
records.summary: Ask your current insurer for a dated record of cover, claims and claim-free periods.
steps: Ask the destination insurer about accepted language

records.title: How to translate insurance documents
records.summary: Confirm the accepted translator and certification standard before ordering a translation.
steps: Keep the source and translated copies together

records.title: What is a no-claims bonus?
records.summary: A commercial rating benefit that may be calculated differently by each market and insurer.

records.title: Driving licence evidence checklist
records.summary: Check validity, issue date, categories and whether an accompanying translation is needed.
steps: Ask whether an international permit is relevant

records.title: International motor insurance moving checklist
records.summary: Prepare recognition evidence before requesting destination-country cover.

records.title: Preparing destination proof of address
records.summary: Insurers may request recent local address evidence in an accepted format.
